name: King of the World
description:
You're the King of the World! Figuratively...No one in the world can deny you due to your ✨special powers✨, so whatever you say or do, everyone will just blindly follow along with!

This includes characters acting like anything you say is normal and totally expected, acting like anything you do is just the average thing to do, and the more unexpected or shocking stuff you do just being totally ignored. I mean, nothing to be alarmed about, right?

Not when you're the King of the World!

Woah, uhm...this bot kinda blew up, huh lol wow 😅 alr tho, I'm not complainin. Nws, i did fix the proxy issue. I also fixed the whole 'bot calling you Neko' thing lol turns out I js copy pasted my own name into the example dialogue ~u~ Also I'm pretty sure I fixed the first 2 issues from before, but, def let me know if there's any other issues you run into :3

Thanks everyone, ehe ^w^
creator: Nekomusume
